mentions.note: Caller held outsized position; Cramer prefers Nucor as superior operator. No specific sell but Nucor better-positioned in steel.
Too risky; if you don't know what asset manager owns you don't want to buy; can't find out what it's got inside.
Steel maker hurting; needs economic activity; not as good as U.S. Steel; lower rates could help but discouraging near-term.
CEO reports full order book, strong pricing visibility, tight production schedules; hot-rolled steel unchanged past 5 years; healthy steel market backdrop for auto and construction.
